endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/certificates
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of all certificates in the specified service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/certificates/{certificateId}
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the certificate specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{CERTIFICATEID}} with a real certificateid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/certificates/{certificateId}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the certificate being used for authentication with the backend.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{CERTIFICATEID}} with a real certificateid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/certificates/{certificateId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{CERTIFICATEID}} with a real certificateid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: HEAD /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/certificates/{certificateId}
endpoints.description: Gets the entity state (Etag) version of the certificate specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{CERTIFICATEID}} with a real certificateid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
